---
Static
---
!| RememberRecordState |
| type       | id                         | version  | memoryToStorage? |
| user       | 131313                     | test     | OK               |
| user       | 121212                     | test     | OK               |

!| DeleteRecord |
| recordType            | recordId       | deleteRecord? |
| ${fitnesseRecordTypeId}    | $createdRecordId     | OK            |

!| RememberRecordState |
| type       | id                         | version  | memoryToStorage? |
| recordType | ${fitnesseRecordTypeId}         | original | OK               |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseGroupId}              | original | OK               |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId}    | original | OK               |
| metadata   | ${fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId} | original | OK               |


!| DeleteRecord |
| recordType     | recordId                      | deleteRecord? |
| collectTerm    | fitnesseTextVarStorageTerm    | OK            |
| permissionRole | fitnessePermissionTermRole    | OK            |
| permissionRule | fitnessePermissionTermRule    | OK            |
| presentation   | fitnesseToFitnessePLink       | OK            |
| presentation   | fitnesseToFitnesseOutputPLink | OK            |
| metadata       | fitnesseToFitnesseLink        | OK            |
